title: A bill to designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 154 First Avenue East in Jerome, Idaho, as the "Representative Maxine Bell Post Office".
stage_label: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs.
plain_summary: This bill will rename a post office building in Jerome, Idaho. The post office is located at 154 First Avenue East. The new name will be the Representative Maxine Bell Post Office. This change honors Representative Maxine Bell. All official government papers will use this new name for the building.
last_action_text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs.

sections.title: Section 1 Representative Maxine Bell Post Office
sections.text: The post office building located at one hundred fifty four First Avenue East in Jerome, Idaho will now be called the Representative Maxine Bell Post Office. Anytime the government refers to this post office in laws, maps, rules, documents, papers, or other official records, they must use the name Representative Maxine Bell Post Office.
